allow: PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\integ\\quinn-proxy\\quinn_live_dashboard.py"; $info = Get-Item $f; $proc = Get-Process -Id 45000; Write-Output "SCRIPT last modified: $\($info.LastWriteTime\)"; Write-Output "PROCESS started:     $\($proc.StartTime\)"; if \($info.LastWriteTime -gt $proc.StartTime\) { Write-Output "==> Script modified AFTER process start -- restart needed" } else { Write-Output "==> Process is current" })
